ddls:
CREATE TABLE "member_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the member state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the member state */,
  "gdp_nominal" REAL /* GDP (nominal) of the member state in millions */,
  "gdp_nominal_per_capita" REAL /* GDP (nominal) per capita of the member state */,
  "gdp_ppp" REAL /* GDP (PPP) of the member state in millions */,
  "gdp_ppp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP (PPP) per capita of the member state */,
  "realm_status" TEXT /* Realm status of the member state (Yes/No) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the member state */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region of the member state */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the member state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population count */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population count */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the population data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_populations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES member_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_nominal" (
  "gdp_nominal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominal GDP data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the nominal GDP data */,
  "gdp_nominal_millions" REAL /* Nominal GDP in millions */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the GDP data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_nominal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_nominal_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES member_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_nominal_per_capita" (
  "gdp_nominal_per_capita_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominal GDP per capita data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the nominal GDP per capita data */,
  "gdp_nominal_per_capita" REAL /* Nominal GDP per capita */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP per capita data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the GDP per capita data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_nominal_per_capita_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_nominal_per_capita_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES member_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_ppp" (
  "gdp_ppp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PPP GDP data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the PPP GDP data */,
  "gdp_ppp_millions" REAL /* PPP GDP in millions */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the GDP data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_ppp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_ppp_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES member_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_ppp_per_capita" (
  "gdp_ppp_per_capita_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PPP GDP per capita data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the PPP GDP per capita data */,
  "gdp_ppp_per_capita" REAL /* PPP GDP per capita */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP per capita data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the GDP per capita data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_ppp_per_capita_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_ppp_per_capita_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES member_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realm_status" (
  "realm_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each realm status data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the realm status data */,
  "realm_status" TEXT /* Realm status (Yes/No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the realm status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("realm_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realm_status_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES member_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member state being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the member state */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the member state was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES member_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
